## Summary
A short description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why do you need this? What problem does it solve? Include any relevant Selenium API or Playwright equivalents.

## Proposed API / Behaviour
```java
// Example of how the feature would be used
```

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've already tried or thought about.

## Additional Context
Links, screenshots, or any other context.
